hooks.command:
node -e "const p=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH||''; if(p.endsWith('.tsx')||p.endsWith('.ts')&&p.includes('decision-studio-ui')){console.log('
[UI] .tsx file edited: '+p.split('/').pop()+'
Verify visually before committing:
  1. Stack running? If not: .\\restart_decision_studio_ui.ps1
  2. Open http://localhost:5173 and check the affected component
  3. Check browser console for errors
  4. Run: cd decision-studio-ui && npm run build
');}"
